summary: Comprehensive test pass for NextStep India-focused EdTech platform. Created pytest backend suite (28 tests, 100% pass) covering admin auth (BLUELOCKZ/TakiTaki), 12 India-focused opportunities (incl KLE Tech BVB Hubballi), admin role guards, analytics, saved CRUD, profile, AI chat (Claude Sonnet 4.5), notifications, team-finder removal. Playwright UI tests verified /admin-login form, /admin redirect for unauth + student users, sidebar (Analytics present, Team Finder removed, Admin link only for admins), Analytics dashboard rendering (rings, donut, weekly bars, AI insights), Opportunities page (12 cards, KLE Tech + SIH, location filter chips, free-text city search). All features working as specified.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is monolithic (~560 lines). Acceptable for current scope but split into routers (auth.py, opportunities.py, admin.py, ai.py) if it grows further.

Admin credentials are stored as plaintext in backend/.env (ADMIN_PASSWORD=TakiTaki). For production, hash the password (bcrypt) and verify with constant-time compare; current string equality is acceptable for the prototype.
admin_login does not enforce rate-limiting; trivial brute force possible. Consider adding slowapi or fail2ban-style throttle before going live.
POST /api/auth/google/session sets cookie samesite=None + secure=True hardcoded — fine for HTTPS preview, but no fallback for local HTTP dev. Acceptable.
list_opportunities query supports type+q but not location filter on backend; UI filters on the client side. Works for 12 items but won't scale; consider adding location regex query param.
ai/chat does NOT validate empty/oversized message before hitting the LLM (cost risk). Add a length check.
Page title is 'Emergent | Fullstack App' (default) instead of 'NextStep' — minor branding nit.
test_credentials: Admin via POST /api/admin/auth/login with {username:'BLUELOCKZ', password:'TakiTaki'}. Student session injected via mongosh per /app/memory/test_credentials.md.
seed_data_creation: Created two test student users via mongosh (test.student@example.com, fe.student@example.com) with onboarded:true. Admin user admin@nextstep.app auto-created on first admin-login. Opportunity seed (12 India opps) is auto-loaded by backend startup hook.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reusable pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/ — run with: cd /app && python -m pytest backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. conftest.py exposes admin_token (real admin login) and student_token (injects via mongosh). Frontend smoke test pattern: inject session_token cookie via playwright add_cookies on the preview domain (httpOnly, secure, sameSite=None). Public URL = REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL = https://nextstep-ai-2.preview.emergentagent.com.
rca of the issue: No bugs found — all assertions in the review request pass. Admin auth correctly returns 200+cookie+role=admin on valid creds and 401 on invalid. /api/admin/stats and POST/DELETE /api/opportunities correctly return 403 for student tokens and 200 for admin. /api/team/users returns 404 (route removed). Opportunities seed contains 12 India-only entries including KLE Tech Hack 2026 — BVB Hubballi. /api/analytics/me returns the full schema (saved_count, applied_count, profile_completeness, by_type, streak_days). /admin route correctly redirects unauthenticated AND student users to /admin-login (NOT /auth) per ProtectedRoute logic. Sidebar shows Analytics, hides Team Finder, conditionally shows Admin Console link only when role=admin.
